releases.name: 1.14.0-alpha.39
releases.author: nekohasekai
releases.body:
## :memo: Release Notes

* Add L3 forwarding support **1**
* Fixes and improvements

**1**:

Building on the ICMP proxy support introduced in sing-box 1.13.0, TCP and UDP traffic from L3 inbounds (TUN, WireGuard, and Tailscale) can now be forwarded directly to WireGuard and Tailscale endpoints at L3, without going through L3 to L4 translation.

See [Pre-match](https://sing-box.sagernet.org/configuration/shared/pre-match/).

releases.name: 1.14.0-alpha.38
releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.body:
## :memo: Release Notes

* Add Snell protocol support **1**
* Fixes and improvements

**1**: Surge believes that being closed-source and not proliferated can keep [Snell](https://kb.nssurge.com/surge-knowledge-base/release-notes/snell) covert, but this is already impossible in 2026; considering that Snell still has advantages that other random-traffic protocols do not possess, such as multiplexing support with complete TCP semantics and traffic-characteristic diversity, we [implemented it in Go](https://github.com/SagerNet/sing-snell) instead of reinventing the wheel, with all features except the v5 QUIC proxy, behavior as consistent with the official implementation as possible, and performance at least on par with it.

See [Snell Inbound](https://sing-box.sagernet.org/configuration/inbound/snell/) and [Snell Outbound](https://sing-box.sagernet.org/configuration/outbound/snell/).

releases.name: Prerelease-Alpha
releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.body:
Release created at Tue Jul 7 00:56:49 CST 2026 Synchronize Alpha branch code updates, keeping only the latest version
[我应该下载哪个文件? / Which file should I download?](https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo/wiki/FAQ) [二进制文件筛选 / Binary file selector](https://metacubex.github.io/Meta-Docs/startup/#_1) [查看文档 / Docs](https://metacubex.github.io/Meta-Docs/) ## What's Changed * feat: convert support session-table and session-length for xhttp-opts fields by @legiz-ru in https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo/pull/2889 * feat: add `rematch` outbound type and `REMATCH-NAME` rule type by @Medium1992 in https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo/pull/2862 * fix: guard snell pooled connection reuse state by @xream in https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo/pull/2878 * chore: bump mieru version to 3.34.0 by @enfein in https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo/pull/2899 * feat: support custom peer-info for openvpn outbound by @Easy-Ez in https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo/pull/2926 * fix: preserve shadow-tls in-user for snell listeners by @xream in https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo/pull/2934 * fix: add missing json tags to raw config structs by @chenx-dust in https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo/pull/2939 ## New Contributors * @Medium1992 made their first contribution in https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo/pull/2862 * @Easy-Ez made their first contribution in https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo/pull/2926 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo/compare/v1.19.27...Prerelease-Alpha

releases.name: v1.19.27
releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.body:
## What's Changed
* 90b1066e feat: add ping keepalive support for OpenVPN (#2859) by @puppywang
* fd2112ec feat: add built-in proxy PASS-RULE (#2873) by @ECHSFXY
* 1e62d554 feat: add `empty-fallback` to group options allows for customization instead of hardcoding `COMPATIBLE` by @wwqgtxx
* 317bfc20 feat: add `allow-insecure` config to anytls/trojan/vless listeners for nginx/caddy front users by @wwqgtxx
* 358fa5eb feat: add `age-secret-key` for proxy-provider and `-age-secret-key` for cmdline to support age armor format config decryption by @wwqgtxx
* bd72c65b feat: remove `global-client-fingerprint`, please set `client-fingerprint` directly on the proxy instead by @wwqgtxx
* e928ef59 feat: add `path-in-bundle` to rule-providers to support extract from BundleMRS.7z when the local file does not exist by @wwqgtxx

## BUG & Fix
* 11848509 fix: quic sniffer out-of-bounds read causes process crash via single UDP packet by @Guanni Qu
* 1abd1261 fix: validation error handling for age-secret-key by @wwqgtxx
* 5184081a fix: socks4 readUntilNull unbounded memory allocation by @Guanni Qu
* 5bdb1cc7 fix: trojan protocol WaitReadFrom panic via oversized UDP relay length field by @Guanni Qu
* 9761bcd7 fix: exchangeQUIC not fully respecting context by @wwqgtxx
* c7100255 fix: readMsg in doq out-of-bounds access by @wwqgtxx
* dafdd06b fix: variable capture in dns outbound by @wwqgtxx
* dbaf85b7 fix: vision TLS filter out-of-bounds read via crafted session_id length by @Guanni Qu

## Maintenance
* 01edf45c chore: improve internal api by @wwqgtxx
* 316f5df1 chore: add WithDialer option to component/http for api user by @wwqgtxx
* ab56858d chore: sync sudoku v0.4.7 optimizations (#2879) by @saba-futai
* b60e687e chore: support convert age-secret-key to age-public-key for build-in age tool by @wwqgtxx
* d7ac7b52 chore: support std input/output for age encrypt/decrypt tool by @wwqgtxx
* f99d4e1b chore: adjust internal age component api by @wwqgtxx

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo/compare/v1.19.26...v1.19.27

releases.name: v1.19.26
releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.body:
## What's Changed
* 52edebd1 feat: add snell version 4/5 outbound and inbound (#2817) by @xream
* 7a6a6509 feat: support OpenVPN CBC ciphers (#2818) by @Romanov Caesar
* ff98700d feat: support CHACHA20-POLY1305 data cipher for OpenVPN (#2798) by @Lanlan13-14
* fc8c5a24 feat: support comp-lzo for OpenVPN (#2841) by @Zhiqiang Zhang
* 2dd7d599 feat: support MD5/SHA384/SHA512 OpenVPN auth methods by @wwqgtxx
* f1c36561 feat: support AES-192-GCM/AES-192-CBC OpenVPN data ciphers by @wwqgtxx
* f30a64f9 feat: support hysteria2 gecko obfs by @wwqgtxx

## BUG & Fix
* 03e1f449 fix: interface structs do not copy correctly by @wwqgtxx
* 301d580d fix: compile issue of tailscale-wireguard-go dependency by @wwqgtxx
* 3809a03c fix: stack panic after dispatcher attach nil by @wwqgtxx
* 38cb06d3 fix: hysteria2 realm stun domain resolve by @wwqgtxx
* 4065583a fix: masque retry condition by @wwqgtxx
* 5639e93f fix: improve OpenVPN transport reliability (#2824) by @Romanov Caesar
* 8c26d61c fix: tproxy did not pass the additions correctly by @wwqgtxx
* a2aca027 fix: pinger in tailscale not under our control by @wwqgtxx
* a52a27ed fix: errors.ErrUnsupported backport by @wwqgtxx
* a531449b fix: missing param passing in vless listener config by @wwqgtxx
* b230c90d fix: shadowtls v3 client HMAC handling for TLS 1.3 HelloRetryRequest by @wwqgtxx
* d2fcf71c fix: tailscale panic when working with dialer-proxy by @wwqgtxx
* f69331f4 fix: config struct not exported by @wwqgtxx

## Maintenance
* 060711fb chore: more netip.AddrPort using in tproxy by @wwqgtxx
* 0ddf4bbf chore: update sing-tun by @wwqgtxx
* 0dec35ed chore: always dial tcp on netstack for tailscale by @wwqgtxx
* 31ece04a chore: upgrade the embedded xsync.Map to v4.5.0 by @wwqgtxx
* 5b28a0ee chore: optimize sudoku packed hot paths (#2833) by @saba-futai
* 6e15299c chore: remove AF_ALG in tailscale-wireguard-go by @wwqgtxx
* 72f133f4 chore: more logging for tailscale debug by @wwqgtxx
* 8f2d84f9 chore: update mieru version to v3.33.0 (#2840) by @enfein
* a05c94b4 chore: make the proxydialer module no longer directly depend on the tunnel module by @wwqgtxx
* b1a07d20 chore: remove unnecessary member variables added by xsync/v3 by @wwqgtxx
* cb652ddb chore: make the handler-related SNAT key in NewPacket by @wwqgtxx
* d27f3201 chore: use pre-go1.27 tls.QUICConfig.ClientHelloInfoConn API for quic-go to avoid cloning tls.Config by @wwqgtxx
* d60b336d chore: use mihomo name & ver to tailscale reported ver to avoid update prompts (#2801) by @ayanamist
* d610afef chore: clear parameter passing by @wwqgtxx
* e9e23c4e chore: tailscale must be compiled under the `with_gvisor` build tag by @wwqgtxx
* f2da5b7c chore: reduce internal circular dependencies by @wwqgtxx

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo/compare/v1.19.25...v1.19.26

## Maintenance

* faa58f27 chore: add some comments for using the new net/http API by @wwqgtxx

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo/compare/v1.19.24...v1.19.25

releases.name: v1.19.24
releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.body:
## What's Changed
* cacd01a3 feat: add h3 mode support for xhttp client (#2686) by @HanaHime
* 61dc7b10 feat: add http1.1 mode support for xhttp client by @wwqgtxx
* 2337d70d feat: support xhttp new options for bypassing CDN's potential detection by @wwqgtxx
* 6791df12 feat: support `h-keep-alive-period` to xhttp reuse-settings by @wwqgtxx
* 700e25fd feat: support `sc-max-buffered-posts` for xhttp listener by @wwqgtxx
* f109b8b0 feat: support range format for xhttp `sc-max-each-post-bytes` by @wwqgtxx
* ad91303f feat: support upload packet merging in packet-up mode and `sc-min-posts-interval-ms` settings for xhttp transport by @wwqgtxx
* a8472466 feat: convert support new xhttp-opts fields (#2734) by @legiz-ru
* 80072ebb feat: support range format for hysteria2 `hop-interval` by @wwqgtxx
* 1b2ea145 feat: support ipv6 dual stack fallback for masque/trusttunnel/xhttp h3 mode by @wwqgtxx
* 808c0d62 feat: support ipv6 dual stack fallback for hysteria2 by @wwqgtxx
* fdafea36 feat: support ipv6 dual stack fallback for tuic by @wwqgtxx
* 885244a9 feat: support `network: h2` for masque outbound by @wwqgtxx
* db259326 feat: support `bbr-profile` for hysteria2/tuic/trusttunnel/masque by @wwqgtxx
* d701d1c0 feat: add `-post-up` and `-post-down` flags for cmdline by @wwqgtxx
* 8a029da5 feat: add `/storage` endpoint with Get, Put, and Delete methods for restful api by @Zephyruso

## BUG & Fix
* 0495d295 fix: convert normalize VLESS share-link transport mapping (#2694) by @slackworker
* 0f71808c fix: masque h2 conn lifecycle management by @wwqgtxx
* 299a63f8 fix: quic underlay packetConn maybe not closed in doh3/doq by @wwqgtxx
* 299fd337 fix: race in websocket with early data by @wwqgtxx
* 2fbed16d fix: don't add ":80" to Host for vmess http obfs by @wwqgtxx
* 4387c674 fix: race for hysteria2 salamander by @wwqgtxx
* 4f927ca1 fix: CVE-2026-33814 for net/http by @wwqgtxx
* 6fb9d9e4 fix: max payload size estimation on datagram queueing for quic-go by @wwqgtxx
* 83ac220f fix: convert accept obfs/obfs-host as aliases for mode/host in ss v2ray-plugin URL (#2712) by @beck
* 9613f02a fix: random panic by race in proxy id init by @wwqgtxx
* 96a6962b fix: quic underlay packetConn maybe not closed in masque by @wwqgtxx
* acc4f626 fix: quic underlay packetConn not closed in trusttunnel h3 mode by @wwqgtxx
* b00c9857 fix: race in h2mux read by @wwqgtxx
* d4b3d236 fix: race in trusttunnel read by @wwqgtxx
* db63ffbb fix: quic underlay packetConn not closed in xhttp h3 mode by @wwqgtxx
* e4099f0f fix: prevert body not close where conn is already closed before setup for sing-mux and trusttunnel by @wwqgtxx
* ec664a51 fix: option name typo in listener by @wwqgtxx
* f0ad835d fix: BBR scale window for datagram size by @wwqgtxx
* fcbcd10b fix: race in quic get congestion by @wwqgtxx

## Maintenance
* 03253614 chore: add test for xhttp over vless encryption by @wwqgtxx
* 0e0265fd chore: simplify gotConn handling by @wwqgtxx
* 1bee5901 chore: reduce data copy in read packet for masque by @wwqgtxx
* 20cb280c chore: simplify error handling code by @wwqgtxx
* 2247c0eb chore: async xhttp RoundTrip to let some CDN/reverse proxy happy (#2719) by @kyber1024
* 2cfff83e chore: let xhttp server passing stream-one and stream-up mode test under http1 by @wwqgtxx
* 37942ce9 chore: remove unused timeout in socks5 over tls by @wwqgtxx
* 3d6add33 chore: align internal logic by @wwqgtxx
* 3f2b0ba6 chore: test dialer should be created by test tunnel by @wwqgtxx
* 4814c727 chore: add mode restrictions test back by @wwqgtxx
* 49858024 chore: add test for packet upload queue by @wwqgtxx
* 5b013f25 chore: code cleanup by @wwqgtxx
* 6b076839 chore: better DialQuic interface by @wwqgtxx
* 6c407f0f chore: rebuild upload queue logic by @wwqgtxx
* 7ab4eed8 chore: handling edge cases where the transport may dial more than once in test by @wwqgtxx
* 7abf2904 chore: update quic congestion pacer by @wwqgtxx
* 7b737755 chore: add short circuit logic for dual stack dial to decrease unnecessary goroutine by @wwqgtxx
* 7e83399a chore: update comments to clarify why need retry in TestDialer by @wwqgtxx
* 8c1b1a3e chore: check `sc-max-each-post-bytes` greater than zero if set by @wwqgtxx
* a450080e chore: skip sudoku http mask test on windows again by @wwqgtxx
* ab3746a1 chore: update mieru version (#2687) by @enfein
* b0ea75bd chore: using NewClientConn directly instead of the built-in connection pool for masque h2 mode by @wwqgtxx
* c39b680c chore: remove unused limit on concurrent dialing in xhttp client by @wwqgtxx
* cac48917 chore: add deadline wrapper for trusttunnel server by @wwqgtxx
* d4c4b285 chore: allow overriding sing-mux internal tcpTimeout value for testing by @wwqgtxx
* d801e6b6 chore: align with trusttunnel's official session reuse logic (#2683) by @Maxim
* d8cb32b8 chore: move tuic special types to a new package by @wwqgtxx
* d9c447a8 chore: remove unneeded copy in uploadQueue by @wwqgtxx
* df6a5d3f chore: add TestDialer to retry when dial fails for local testing by @wwqgtxx
* dfc888d0 chore: update default headers in xhttp by @wwqgtxx
* e0a42d4e chore: remove strict timeout restrictions in test for slow github action by @wwqgtxx
* e1bdfba0 chore: update dlclark/regexp2 by @wwqgtxx
* e38aa82a chore: don't force bind interface when using fd for tun by @wwqgtxx
* ebc41ea8 chore: update mieru version (#2721) by @enfein
* f425c81a chore: read as much data as possible from the reader by @wwqgtxx
* f5183da5 chore: correct the xhttp reuse-settings item order by @wwqgtxx
* fa081fb1 chore: rebuild masque h2 conn read logic by @wwqgtxx
* fe7f3d61 chore: rebuild `max-connections` logic in `reuse-settings` by @wwqgtxx

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo/compare/v1.19.23...v1.19.24

releases.author: kastov

# 🌊 Remnawave v2.7.3

meta.description: A modern GUI client based on Electron, designed to run in Windows, macOS and Linux for tailored proxy experience

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.body: ## 1.3.1 - fixed system proxy - fixed bug from issue #89 ### Download link： #### Windows 10/11： #### macOS 11+： #### Linux：

releases.name: pre-release
releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.body:
## 1.3.1

- fixed system proxy
- fixed bug from issue #89

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.body: ## 1.3.0 - new update notifier - improved ui on proxies page - added default values for route-exclude-address - added headers for hiding global mode and downloading custom css - added yaml view in rules editor - improved hwid (for Remnawave v2.8.0) - fix setup public dns on macos - added translations in monaco editor - fixed ui for overrided GLOBAL selector ### Download link： #### Windows 10/11： #### macOS 11+： #### Linux：

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.body: ## 1.2.0 - reduced memory usage - fix problem with deeplink alert after restart with autostart enabled - implement hot reloading config - fix bug with adding a rule at the end - fixed an issue with retrieving data via a proxy - fixed an issue with profile updates (please test) - ui fixes - other optimizations ### Download link： #### Windows 10/11： #### macOS 11+： #### Linux：

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.body: # Changelog - Merge remote-tracking branch 'origin/main' - minor ui fix - fix working ports without enabled sysproxy - minor ui fix - fixed rendering bug - fixed an issue where the proxy could not be disabled when switching to a different mode in the settings - minor ui improvements - fix white screen - fix memory leak - Update .gitignore - improve update button ### Download link： #### Windows10/11： #### macOS 11+： #### Linux：

meta.description: A fork of the multi-platform proxy client FlClash, based on original Mihomo Core, simple and easy to use, open source and ad-free.

releases.name: v0.4.0-pre.17
releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.body:
- feat: redesign connections page — tabs, app/exe icons, destination flags, zashboard button - refactor: compute hwid in memory, drop shared_preferences persistence - feat: classic navbar with old dashboard, hero navbar with new - fix: newboard header via flclashx-custom (update=every apply, add=on first add), unlock toggle - fix: android battery drain, instant host pings, launch flow and tun lifecycle, macos dns
⚠️ **Pre-release version** • For testing purposes only [![Release Downloads](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/pluralplay/FlClashX/v0.4.0-pre.17/total?style=flat-square&logo=github)](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/pluralplay/FlClashX/v0.4.0-pre.17/)

releases.name: v0.4.0-pre.16
releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.body:
- feat: show core version in build-core run name - fix: remove duplicate branch input from build-core, use workflow_dispatch ref - fix: ip-check sequential with timeouts - fix: announce emoji on new dashboard - fix: android tun re-setup on connect - feat: vendor utls firefox148/safari26 - bump mihomo core 1.19.27 - feat: tv phone-sync - flclashx-override global yaml logic - new header: buy buttons
⚠️ **Pre-release version** • For testing purposes only [![Release Downloads](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/pluralplay/FlClashX/v0.4.0-pre.16/total?style=flat-square&logo=github)](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/pluralplay/FlClashX/v0.4.0-pre.16/)

meta.description: Легковесный и функциональный Telegram-бот для Remnawave

commits.author: Mrvibecodic

commits.author: Mrvibecodic

commits.message: feat(вайтлист): предзаполнение вайтлиста по Telegram ID
commits.author: Mrvibecodic

commits.message: docs(readme): отразить новые возможности бота
commits.author: Mrvibecodic

commits.message: docs(pages): бейджи фич dev→stable после слияния dev в main

commits.author: Mrvibecodic

meta.description: Прослойка-ру-зеркало для подписок Remnawave с расширенными возможностями

commits.message: chore(ci): обновление GitHub Actions на Node 24 (checkout@v5, docker/*@v4/v6/v7)
commits.author: Mrvibecodic

commits.message: ui(connection): скрывать выбор ключей HWID до включения парсинга из User-Agent
commits.author: Mrvibecodic

commits.message: ui(connection): точнее описание тумблера страницы в режиме «Зеркало»
commits.author: Mrvibecodic

commits.message: feat(subpage): опциональная отдача страницы подписки в режиме «Зеркало»
commits.author: Mrvibecodic

commits.message: feat(proxy): опциональный приём ссылок /api/sub/<shortUuid>
commits.author: Mrvibecodic

commits.message: Merge pull request #3 from Mrvibecodic/dev
commits.author: Mrvibecodic

commits.message: ui(wgpool): не сжимать ник бейджем клиента, переносить бейдж под ник
commits.author: Mrvibecodic

commits.message: feat(wgpool): сохранять и показывать клиента выдачи в подсказке
commits.author: Mrvibecodic

commits.message: fix(squadconf): не подмешивать AmneziaWG в Happ/Incy (base64)
commits.author: Mrvibecodic

commits.message: ui(connection): расширить предупреждение о выключении проверки TLS
commits.author: Mrvibecodic

meta.description: Простой статуспейдж поверх xray-checker с расширенными функциями управления через Telegram бота

commits.message: bot: топики форума в NOTIFY_CHAT_IDS (chatID:threadID)
commits.author: Mrvibecodic

commits.message: bot: доставка алертов/сводки в доп. чаты/группы через NOTIFY_CHAT_IDS
commits.author: Mrvibecodic

commits.message: история: автоконсолидация по имени при смене stableId сервера
commits.author: Mrvibecodic

commits.message: поддержка XRAY_JSON в прослойке /sub: проброс UA чекера + JSON-фильтр
commits.author: Mrvibecodic

commits.message: группировка узлов балансира (чекер 1.3.0): одна плитка на группу
commits.author: Mrvibecodic

commits.message: merge: bring dev into main — group sub-servers, global-outage confirm, admin stealth + token min-length, light-theme contrast, auto-hide abs
commits.author: Mrvibecodic

commits.message: feature: auto-hide servers absent from checker (data kept); hide/restore + delete-from-DB in admin
commits.author: Mrvibecodic

commits.message: docs: credit ASTORKA as contributor
commits.author: Mrvibecodic

commits.message: improvements: confirm global outages (no discard), admin stealth + token min-length, light-theme contrast
commits.author: Mrvibecodic

commits.message: feat(admin): тогл «игнорировать глобальные сбои» + CLAUDE.md
